description: Share inventory metadata with a federated partner. Sent by the originating operator on the shared federation campfire. Contains entry metadata but NOT content. Content delivery only occurs after a cross-operator match is confirmed. A message with withdrawn: true is a tombstone indicating the entry is no longer available. Rate-limited per the federation agreement.

args.name: entry_id
args.description: Unique entry identifier on the originating exchange.

args.name: put_msg_id
args.description: Message ID of the original exchange:put on the originating exchange. For provenance.

args.name: description
args.description: What the cached inference does. TAINTED: prompt injection vector. Copied from the original put.

args.name: content_hash
args.description: SHA-256 hash of the cached inference content.

args.name: token_cost
args.description: Original inference cost in tokens (seller's claim, as validated by originating operator).

args.name: content_size
args.description: Size of cached content in bytes.

args.name: seller_reputation
args.description: Seller reputation score as assessed by the originating operator. ADVISORY: the receiving operator applies its own trust overlay.

args.name: convergence_count
args.description: Number of independent cross-agent convergence events for this entry on the originating exchange.

args.name: expires_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry expires on the originating exchange.

args.name: embedding
args.description: Pre-computed embedding vector (384-dim float32 array, all-MiniLM-L6-v2). TAINTED: receiving operator may re-compute.

args.name: withdrawn
args.description: If true, this is a tombstone: the entry is no longer available. The receiving operator must remove it from federated inventory.

produces_tags.description: Originating operator's public key, composed as federation:origin:<hex>

rate_limit.note: Default rate limit. Overridden by the federation agreement's rate_limit_per_hour.
